title: Overview page loads with navigation
steps: Observe the hero title, automation form, and navigation links
expectedResult: The page renders the The360 Insights AI QA heading, automation inputs, and links for Overview, History, and Insights.

title: Valid website input calculates summary and enables save
expectedResult: The summary values are rendered correctly and the Save Run button becomes enabled.

title: Saving a valid run persists it to history
expectedResult: The saved run appears in history with destination, style, budget, and risk details.

title: History filter shows only matching styles
steps: Save runs with different travel styles
expectedResult: Only Comfort runs remain visible in the history list.

title: Insights page shows aggregate stats from saved runs
expectedResult: The page shows total run count, average total budget, average daily budget, most common style, and Too Tight count.

title: Reset clears form and disables save
expectedResult: The form is cleared, results return to placeholders, and Save Run is disabled again.

title: Blank submission shows required errors
steps: Submit the overview form without entering values
expectedResult: Required field errors appear and no run is generated.

title: Run name below minimum is rejected
steps: Enter a one-character run name with otherwise valid values
expectedResult: The run name validation message appears and generation does not complete.

title: Server rejects malformed run payload
steps: Send a malformed POST request to the backend
expectedResult: The backend returns a validation error response and does not store the run.

title: Minimum valid values compute Too Tight risk
steps: Enter the minimum valid budget and counts
expectedResult: The run is generated and the risk level is Too Tight.

title: Balanced risk threshold is inclusive at 35
steps: Enter values that produce daily per traveler exactly 35

title: Maximum valid values compute successfully
expectedResult: The run renders without validation errors and the totals display correctly.

title: Clear all removes persisted runs from history
expectedResult: The history list is emptied and the empty-state message is shown.

title: Insights page returns to empty state after clearing runs
expectedResult: The insights page shows zeroed stats or an empty-state message.

title: Save still persists if the user navigates away immediately
expectedResult: The run is still saved and appears in history even if the page changes quickly.

title: Compare page shows saved runs and best-value spotlight
expectedResult: The compare page renders saved runs in a table and highlights the best-value run.
